finding.contract_claim: Symbol `get_file_tools` is declared but appears unused — no references were found outside its own declaration.
finding.observed_behavior: No callers or importers of `get_file_tools` were found in the fixture project; consumer modules import the get_*_tool_definitions() variants instead, so this wrapper is never invoked even though the TOOL constant it returns is alive.

finding.triage_reasoning: Reality: get_file_tools() at L311-313 has zero callers across 6 swept files. Consumer modules have migrated to the get_*_tool_definitions() variants (e.g., get_file_tool_definitions() is actively imported in shadow.py per Claim 5 evidence). The older get_file_tools() wrapper is never invoked. Significance: Dead code that adds noise around a pattern migration. Actionability: Remove the function.
finding.suggested_fix: Remove the get_file_tools() function; all consumers use get_file_tool_definitions() instead.
